subcodes.first_line: O two true friends! Your letter was received. Thanks be to God that it testified to sincerity, uprightness and devotion to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو دوست حقیقی نامه شما رسید شکر خدا را که دلیل بر راستی و درستی و خداپرستی بود
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @love and unity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
